dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Approves Ultra-Deepwater Oil Drilling Plan
dailyNews.description: The $5 billion project in the Gulf of Mexico is expected to help produce up to 10 billion barrels of oil by the end of this decade. Critics say it could endanger people and marine life.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Legal Threat Complicates Trump’s Pick for Fed Chair
dailyNews.description: An investigation of the Federal Reserve was thwarted on Friday, but a department appeal could reimpose an obstacle in Kevin Warsh’s path.

dailyNews.title: Lobbyist Arrested in Extortion Attempt of Client Who Received a Trump Pardon
dailyNews.description: Josh Nass had recently represented Joseph Schwartz, a former nursing home executive who was convicted of tax crimes before being freed by the president late last year.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Officials Embraced an Animal Rights Campaign
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is curbing animal experiments in response to shifts in public opinion, technological advances, years of animal rights advocacy and the work of a conservative activist.

dailyNews.title: Does Trump Risk Turning America Into a Rogue State?
dailyNews.description: The United States helped create safeguards to limit the brutality of war, and now I fear President Trump is dismantling them.

dailyNews.title: Tehran threatens to retaliate after U.S. attacks vital Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump's comments came shortly after he said that the U.S. military had conducted "one of the most power bombing raids" on a vital Iranian oil hub.

dailyNews.title: Trump thanks TSA agents working with no pay amid government shutdown
dailyNews.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down the U.S. strikes on Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: President Trump's announcement about strikes on Kharg Island has sparked more questions about the potential of U.S. military boots on the ground.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Trump administration's subpoenas against Fed Chair Powell
dailyNews.description: A federal judge blocked two grand jury subpoenas against Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Friday. Chief Judge James Boasberg wrote that "the Government has offered no evidence whatsoever that Powell committed any crime other than displeasing the President."

dailyNews.title: U.S. strikes key Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Friday night on social media that the U.S. struck a key Iranian oil hub on Kharg Island as tensions over the global oil supply ramp up amid Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. forces have destroyed the military assets of Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: In a Truth Social post, President Trump said that the U.S. forces "obliterated" Iranian military targets on Kharg Island. The president said the island's oil infrastructure was spared in the attack, but could be struck down the road.

dailyNews.title: Some Republicans warn Trump's SAVE America Act is doomed as Senate tees up a vote
dailyNews.description: Sen. Mike Lee has an online army pressuring Republicans to pass the SAVE America Act, a sweeping election bill, that President Donald Trump declared his top priority.
